source.section: 2 - AN/APG-73 Radar > 2.1 - Air-to-Air Modes > 2.1.5 - VS (Velocity Search) Mode

steps.action: From radar page, slew the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) over “RWS” or “TWS” mode indication. The “RWS/VS/TWS” mode selector will appear.
Slew TDC over “VS”, then press the TDC to select Velocity Search.
Targets will appear as “bricks” on a closure velocity vs azimuth scale.
You may perform a STT (Single Target Track) lock the same way as you would do in RWS mode.
